changelog.author: Dan Ionescu
changelog.summary: Initial Sacred Architecture Signal Stack deployment
changes: Published index.html — main landing with Harta Fricii, Risk Matrix, Pricing
Published ghid.html — Visual compliance guide, 10 FAQ, all contacts
Published faq.html — 20 FAQ with FAQPage JSON-LD dual layer
Deployed full AI signal stack: ai.json, llms.txt, robots.txt, proof.json, governance.json, entities.json, sitemap.xml, humans.txt
Deployed extended signal stack: intents.json, policy.json, allow-lane-matrix.json, aliases.json, actions.json, entity-graph.jsonld, entity-index.json, session.json, changelog.json, ai-proof.json
All AI crawlers explicitly allowed: ClaudeBot, GPTBot, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, CCBot
Custom domain eu-ai-act.ro connected to Cloudflare Pages

versioning_policy.MAJOR: New pages, new signal files, architecture changes
